apihelp-query+gadgets-summary: Waxay soo celisaa liiska aaladaha lagu isticmaalo wiki-kan.
apihelp-query+gadgets-param-prop: Macluumaadka aaladda ee la doonayo in la helo:
apihelp-query+gadgets-paramvalue-prop-de: Sharaxaadda aaladda oo loo beddelay HTML (waxay noqon kartaa gaabis, isticmaal kaliya haddii loo baahdo).
apihelp-query+gadgets-param-ids: Aqoonsiyada aaladaha la doonayo in la soo saaro.
apihelp-query+gadgets-param-allowedonly: Kaliya soo bandhig aaladaha loo oggol yahay isticmaalaha hadda.
apihelp-query+gadgets-param-enabledonly: Kaliya soo bandhig aaladaha uu isticmaaluhu hadda daaray.
apihelp-query+gadgets-example-2: Hel liiska aaladaha oo leh dhammaan sifooyinka suurtagalka ah
apihelp-query+gadgets-example-3: Hel liiska aaladaha ku jira qaybta "foo"
apihelp-query+gadgets-example-5: Hel liiska aaladaha uu isticmaalaha hadda daaray
